title: Insights tab - Quality in the Back Office
bodyHtml:
Along with Quality Charter , your Quality KPIs (Key Performance Indicator) are one of the most important tools to help manage your product quality and customer satisfaction on Back Market.


You can access your Quality metrics simply via Back Office with the ability to filter on specific metrics, and can export the raw data.

 

How to access this Quality Insights?

From the Back Office, click on the 'Insights' tab. You will see the 'Quality Dashboard' section, where you will be able to have a deeper look into your metrics. 


Troubleshooting: If you see a connection page instead of your Dashboard, that means that cross-site tracking is disabled. No worries, here is what you should do to get access to your Dashboard:


If you use Safari, you have two options:

  • Use another browser (Chrome or Firefox for example).
  • Enable cross-site tracking in Safari. Here is the way to change your system preferences in Safari.

If you use Chrome or Firefox, and it still does not work:

  • Turn cookies on.

 

How exactly is it working and how to read my quality indicators?

You will have access to your five KPIs:

 

  • Defective rate
  • On-Time Delivery rate / On-Time Shipping rate
  • Appearance rate
  • Order Cancellation rate
  • Wrong Item rate

Note that this page is only for Sales monitoring, for BuyBack, please, refer to Insights - BuyBox Dashboard in your Back Office.

 

Here is an overview of the homepage:

 

 

From here, you will be able to dive deep into the 5 metrics.

 

Defective Rate

Definition

This metric represents the level of contacts linked to the functionality of the product and accessories ordered and delivered in the last 90 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes and may lead to a 30-day sales suspension at a device model level if you are among the lowest performing ones.

 

Cohort: 90 days.

On-Time Delivery Rate / On-Time Shipping rate

Definition

This metric represents the share of the orders that were supposed to be shipped and delivered in the past 30 days that were tracked by Back Market's tools and delivered on time. In a nutshell, were you able to ship and deliver the tracked product in the promised time?

 

Cohort: 30 days.

Appearance Rate

Definition

This metric represents the share of the orders delivered in the past 90 days that generated no contact related to a functionality issue (technical claim only so far)

 

Cohort: 30 days.

Order Cancellation Rate

Definition

This metric represents the number of orders placed that you canceled in the last 7 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes and, in case of a significant increase of orders you canceled within a short period of time, Back Market reserves the right to suspend your account until we receive clarification and a solution for their situation.

 

Cohort: 7 days.

Wrong Item Rate 

Definition

This metric reflects the customer contacts linked to wrong items received, including incompatible accessories, for orders delivered in the last 30 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes.

 

Cohort: 30 days.

 

Raw data can be exported, and we advise you to do so, this will give you constructive insights on customer requests and satisfaction. With all this information you are able to monitor and improve your quality to ensure the best customer experience and the better sales at our platform.

 

How to download raw data?

  • Click on the "Download Excel or CSV file" button in the bottom left corner of your screen.
  • Select the information you would like to download (for raw data, for example, select "Raw data" little square.)
  • You can select CSV or excel extension
  • Click on "Download". Wait a few seconds and the file will be automatically downloaded on your computer.

 

Below is an excerpt from one of our webinars designed to help you navigate the Quality Insight Dashboard. Feel free to check it out for more detailed explanations.
